_comment: Brand config for aion. Read at build time by scripts/build.py. Edit + reinstall to rebrand the CLI's name, identity, default plugins, and behavior. Same shape as Proteus's brand.config.json so the two systems share concepts.

api._comment: Provider selection. Materialized to .env-active by build. API keys live separately in .env-secret (NOT tracked).

prompts._comment: Injected BEFORE the base system prompt. Empty = default behavior.

modelIdentity._comment: off = base 'You are an AI assistant' prompt. partial/full = brand-rewritten using display + tagline.
